commands.review_summary:
The PR splits the diffs viewer Shiki runtime into a smaller default bundle plus a new `diffs-language-pack` plugin, with asset build scripts, package metadata, docs, generated inventory updates, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +657, Tests +149, Docs +41, Config +56, Other +23. Total +926 across 34 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: source inspection of the PR head shows the undeclared `esbuild` import and missing official catalog entry. I did not run build or install commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR is draft and maintainer-labeled, and the remaining work includes package/dependency surfaces plus an intentional compatibility tradeoff.

target.title: Split diffs Shiki language pack
target.body:
## Summary

- Split the diffs viewer Shiki runtime into a curated default bundle plus an optional `diffs-language-pack` plugin for extended languages.
- Keep common languages highlighted out of the box and degrade uncommon language hints to plain text unless the language pack plugin and generated runtime asset are available.
- Add language-pack plugin source/package metadata, asset build scripts, docs, generated plugin inventory/reference docs, and targeted tests for language selection and asset serving.

## Bundle size metrics

Measured with `node` using raw byte length, `zlib.gzipSync(..., { level: 9 })`, and `zlib.brotliCompressSync(..., { BROTLI_PARAM_QUALITY: 11 })` after rebuilding both viewer runtimes. The full language-pack runtime is generated ad hoc by `extensions/diffs-language-pack/scripts/build-viewer.mjs`; it is intentionally not committed.

| Runtime | Raw bytes | gzip bytes | brotli bytes |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| Full language-pack runtime generated by `extensions/diffs-language-pack/scripts/build-viewer.mjs` | 9,952,231 | 1,726,813 | 1,133,818 |
| New default diffs runtime (`extensions/diffs/assets/viewer-runtime.js`) | 4,477,804 | 734,633 | 465,700 |
| Default bundle reduction | 5,474,427 | 992,180 | 668,118 |
| Default bundle reduction percent | 55.01% | 57.46% | 58.93% |

## Verification

- `bun scripts/build-viewer.mjs` in `extensions/diffs`
- `bun scripts/build-viewer.mjs` in `extensions/diffs-language-pack`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/diffs/src/language-hints.test.ts extensions/diffs/src/render.test.ts extensions/diffs/src/config.test.ts extensions/diffs/src/store.test.ts extensions/diffs/src/browser.test.ts test/scripts/oxlint-config.test.ts` (94 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/bundled-plugin-assets.test.ts test/plugin-npm-release.test.ts test/plugin-npm-package-manifest.test.ts` (36 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/diffs/api.ts extensions/diffs/index.ts extensions/diffs/runtime-api.ts extensions/diffs/src extensions/diffs/scripts extensions/diffs-language-pack/api.ts extensions/diffs-language-pack/index.ts extensions/diffs-language-pack/src extensions/diffs-language-pack/scripts`
- `node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: default diffs viewer no longer ships the full Shiki language runtime; uncommon languages use the optional `diffs-language-pack` runtime when that plugin and generated runtime asset are available.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree on macOS with Node/Bun repo wrappers; GitHub PR checks on commit `4e75900ffee7dbd3ab44761081584b3cf65b4b44` completed with no failures.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification.

Evidence after fix: targeted diffs language/render/asset tests and plugin package/static asset contract tests passed; both viewer runtimes rebuilt and measured.

Observed result after fix: common languages stay in the default runtime, uncommon language hints fall back to text without the generated language-pack runtime, and the language-pack viewer asset is selected only when available.

What was not tested: full release/package publishing was not run locally.
target.author: romneyda
